note: Implemented wg_listen FFI function in socket_ffi.rs. Validates device handle, parses optional bind address (null = any), creates TCP socket via SocketManager, binds with tcp_listen, returns positive listener fd or WG_ERR_BIND_FAILED/WG_ERR_INVALID_HANDLE. Added 6 unit tests. All 393 project tests pass. C header auto-regenerated.
